name: Reka Edge (2026)
license: Reka Edge Community License (free for orgs with <$1M annual revenue; commercial license required above that)
archDisplay: 657M ConvNeXt V2 vision encoder + 6.4B dense transformer LM backbone trained from scratch (custom Yasa2ForConditionalGeneration architecture)
note: New generation of Reka Edge (distinct from the original Feb 2024 7B Reka Edge already in the corpus), positioned for physical AI / robotics / edge cameras; 3x fewer input tokens per image and up to 65% higher throughput than comparable 8B VLMs, with 4-bit quantization cutting memory from 13GB to ~5GB while keeping >98% of full-precision benchmark performance.
